title: Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide

[[October]] [[2003]]<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' was a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'', which was published on [[October 14]], [[2003]] per {{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news20031003.html|text=Rebels Strike Back with Bonus Disc}}, and was advertised as being available in the pages of {{BookCite|title=[[Nintendo Power]]|number=issue 172|publisher=[[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]]|date=[[October]] [[2003]]|link=https://archive.org/details/nintendo-power-issue-172-october-2003}}.</ref>
|type=Paperback
|pages=128<ref name="Guide" />
|dimensions=
|weight=
|isbn=9781930206441
|series=
|preceded by=''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''
|followed by=
}}
'''''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide''''',<ref name="Guide" /> also called '''''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike Player's Guide''''',<ref name="Copyright">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' copyright section</ref> was a strategy guide written by [[George Sinfield]] for the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' from [[LucasArts]] published by [[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]] for the ''[[Nintendo Power]]'' magazine<ref name="Guide" /> in around [[October]] 2003.<ref name="Date" />

==Contents==
*Introduction
**Gameplay Modes
**Flight Control
**Starfighters
**Character Control
**Ground Vehicles
**Campaign Breakdown
*Luke Skywalker's Campaign
**Tatooine Training
**Revenge of the Empire
**Defiance on Datooine
**Defenders of Ralltiir
**Extraction from Ralltiir
**Battlefield Hoth
**Trials of a Jedi
**Sarlacc Pit
*Wedge Antilles' Campaign
**Raid at Bakura
**Relics of Geonosis
**Deception at Destrillion
**Guns of Dubrillion
**Fondor Shipyard Assault
*Endor Campaign
**Speeder Bike Pursuit
**Triumph of the Rebellion
*Bonus Missions
**Death Star Rescue
**Escape from Hoth
**Flight from Bespin
**Attack of the Executor
**Rebel Endurance
*Cooperative Campaign
**Rogue Reborn
**Death Star Attack
**Ison Corridor Ambush
**Battle of Hoth
**Prisons of the Maw
**Razor Rendezvous
**Vengeance on Kothlis
**Imperial Academy Heist
**Raid on Bespin
**Battle of Endor
**Strike at the Core
**Bonus Mission: Death Star Escape
**Bonus Mission: The Asteroid Field
**Bonus Mission: Endurance
*Versus Mode
**Versus Mode Overview
**Dogfight
**Rampage
**Tag and Defend
**Special

==Continuity==
On the back of the strategy guide [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was misspelled as "Bobba Fett."
